description: Total asset value grouped by category.
purpose: Asset value breakdown for financial dashboards.
fromSql: SELECT eam_as_category_id AS category_id, COUNT(*) AS asset_count, COALESCE(SUM(eam_as_purchase_cost),0) AS total_cost, COALESCE(SUM(eam_as_book_value),0) AS total_book_value FROM mt_eam_asset WHERE tenant_id = #{params.tenantId} AND eam_as_status NOT IN ('disposed') GROUP BY eam_as_category_id ORDER BY total_cost DESC

purpose: Work order KPIs for operations dashboard.
fromSql: SELECT eam_wo_status AS status, COUNT(*) AS wo_count, COALESCE(SUM(eam_wo_cost),0) AS total_cost FROM mt_eam_work_order WHERE tenant_id = #{params.tenantId} GROUP BY eam_wo_status ORDER BY wo_count DESC
